scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test WAVY_NODE_MOCK_MODE=true ARKSCORE_SUBJECT_HASH_SALT=arkscore-demo-subject-hash-salt ARKSCORE_SCORE_RATE_LIMIT_MAX=4 WAVY_NODE_INTEGRATION_SECRET=integration_test_secret WAVY_NODE_INTEGRATION_USER_DATA_JSON='{"givenName":"ArkScore","email":"compliance@example.com"}' tsx --test src/app.test.ts src/config/env.test.ts && NODE_ENV=test WAVY_NODE_MOCK_MODE=false WAVY_NODE_API_KEY=wavy_test_key WAVY_NODE_PROJECT_ID=project_test tsx --test src/services/wavy-node.test.ts && tsc --noEmit
